---
title: "Food + Nature Pics"
---

Some pics that I took recently of some of the most beautiful views and the most scrumptious food

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](IMG_1532.jpeg)

Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon, Iceland

![](IMG_3421.jpeg)

Blood Orange + Matcha Shaved Ice (Tokyo, Japan)

![](IMG_9493.jpeg)

Northern Lights, Höfn í Hornafirði, Iceland

![](IMG_4231.JPG)

Unagi + Sashimi Platter (Mount Fuji, Japan)

![](IMG_3903.jpeg)

Qianhai Lake, Beijing, China

![](IMG_4847.jpeg)

Salswee Pastries (NYC, New York)

:::
